arts.ttl: La Liga round-up: Villarreal, Real Sociedad falter in European race as Alaves move out of relegation zone
arts.sum: Wednesday saw four more La Liga matches played across Spain, and each one had something major on the line. Real Madrid took on Getafe in the featured game, with the other three seeing Celta Vigo host Villarreal, Athletic Club take on Las Palmas, while Real Sociedad made the short trip to face Alaves in a […] The post La Liga round-up: Villarreal, Real Sociedad falter in European race as Alaves move out of relegation zone appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Aberdeen ex transfer chief delighted to see Pape Gueye come good as due diligence on Hampden hero pays off
arts.sum: The former Pittodrie transfer chief was delighted to see two of his signings star in the semi final victory against the Jambos last weekend

arts.ttl: Celta Vigo star to miss Villarreal clash through injury
